title: Stir-Fried Fermented Tofu with Crispy Onions
description: A quick and savory stir-fry made with fermented tofu, crispy onions, and a hint of olive oil.

ingredients.name: fermented tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into small cubes

instructions: Heat olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add sliced onions and stir-fry until they start to brown.
Add fermented tofu cubes and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, until they start to brown.
Add stir-fry sauce and stir-fry for another minute, until everything is well coated.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
If desired, garnish with crispy fried onions.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
